contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or an issue? Send us a message and we will get back to you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent.

ecm.heroSubtitle: ECM Support is your single workspace to report, track, and resolve ECM Business Suite issues — with the right people on every ticket.
ecm.aboutBody: We help teams keep their ECM Business Suite running smoothly. Report an issue, follow it through a clear workflow, and collaborate with engineers and reviewers until it is resolved.
ecm.aboutPoint2: Role-based workflows for engineers and reviewers
ecm.partnersSubtitle: Trusted by teams that rely on ECM.
ecm.footerTagline: Support that keeps your team moving.

ctc.heroSubtitle: The CTC Support system is your single workspace to report, track, and resolve issues on CTC's SAP projects — with the right people on every ticket.
ctc.aboutBody: This is the support system for CTC's SAP projects. Report an issue, follow it through a clear workflow, and collaborate with engineers, reviewers, and consultants until it is resolved.
ctc.partnersSubtitle: Trusted by the teams behind CTC's SAP project.
